summary: Surah Al-Hadid emphasizes Allah’s absolute power, knowledge, and control over the universe. It urges believers to have faith, spend in Allah’s cause, and seek forgiveness. The surah contrasts the destinies of the believers, hypocrites, and disbelievers, and highlights the transience of worldly life compared to the eternal reward of the Hereafter. It mentions previous prophets and scriptures, and encourages humility, charity, and striving for righteousness.
